title: Robot Teleoperation for Ultrasound Scanning
description: Built a real-time remote teleoperation system with haptic feedback for robot-assisted ultrasound scanning.

title: ROS2 Framework for Orthopedic Surgical Robotics
description: Developed modular ROS2 components for navigation, sensing, and control in robot-assisted orthopedic surgery.

title: 5-Axis Robotic Laser Cutting for Cranial Implants
description: Designed and implemented a full robotic workflow including mechanical design, GUI, registration, and toolpath optimization for implant modification.
